description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a well-maintained front yard and a driveway leading to a garage. The structure features a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white and gray exterior finishes, complemented by landscaped greenery and several trees. The front facade includes a covered porch area and a paved walkway connecting to the street. The backyard is spacious, with additional trees, a small garden, and what appears to be a gazebo or outdoor seating area. The property is bordered by a low fence and is adjacent to a road with parked cars. The overall design emphasizes open space, natural light, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens, featuring a garage and a covered porch on a rectangular lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, and landscaped front yard with street access.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the transition from the front yard to the spacious backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, garden, gazebo, and the back facade of the bungalow with additional windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side garden, trees, and the connection between the front and back yards.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and sides
